name: A Summer Day with Natsuki | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV! | Remastered!
description:
Just a Summer Day with Natsuki. What antics will she get you involved in? Or maybe this is all some way to have your attention..?

Part of my: "Update Old Content" upgrades!

I have returned to update the bio, and Personality! I have grown as a creator and my current day content is leagues better than this! Why am I here? To improve it! :)

The OG Natsuki Bot I made! Now remastered and updated with the next roleplay experience in mind! :) Onto the notes!

  • Fluff Prioritized! — This was intended for Fluff! So, do not expect Angst, Horror or Smut! Though, you are of course allowed to do whatever you want! :)

  • Natsuki! — In this scenario! It's just you and Natsuki on a summer day hangout! Though, the scenario may feel incredibly simple, it is my older content! Stuff I wanted to upgrade, but preserve the classic feel! Natsuki is incredibly cute, and even more cuter with the upgraded Definition!

  • ANYPOV! — As usual, Natsuki likes you regardless of gender! 💙

  • Remastered! — Introduction Message is the original, but the personality and behind the scenes LLM fixes were applied! Better experience that matches my current day content! (June 7th, 2025.)

That's about it! 💙

I hope you enjoy/enjoyed this! Whether you are new! Or returning to try it out again! 😄 Remastering these classics are important, they made me the creator I am. These are the picture perfect definition of who I am on J.ai.

My Discord: HERE!

My Kofi: HERE! (Donations/Commissions)

I have a plethora of DDLC Content available for you to use... If you liked this, and want more! Check my profile! 💙
creator: GhostOfOmi
